title: Outlook sync to iphone calendar
excerpt: I am new to Monday.com and have successfully been able to integrate the calendar into outlook on my PC. However the Monday Calendar does not then sync from Outlook onto my iphone calendar (all other outlook calendar appo…

posts.author: Mel (Mel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am new to Monday.com and have successfully been able to integrate the calendar into outlook on my PC. However the Monday Calendar does not then sync from Outlook onto my iphone calendar (all other outlook calendar appointments are visible). Can anyone help with this? It is imperative that we can have appointments created on our iphone. Is there another way of doing this?

Thank you for your help

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mel!

At the moment our calendar integrations are one way, they only sync information passed from monday.com onto the calendar they are integrating to and not the other way around.

Our team is aware of this inconvenience and they are analyzing whether a two way sync may be possible in the future.

posts.author: Mel (Mel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Erick.

That is appreciated. I just wanted to confirm that from my understanding I have it correct in that once the original appointment is made and that comes across to the calendar even if the date or time is then changed in Monday it wont update in the external calendar.
